description_long: This object is a residential complex featuring multiple single-story houses arranged symmetrically around a central courtyard with a large swimming pool. The houses are surrounded by white perimeter walls and have flat or gently sloped roofs in shades of beige and terracotta. The complex includes paved walkways, green lawn areas, and a parking lot with marked spaces adjacent to the main road. The main entrance is defined by a wide gate and a driveway leading into the property. The overall layout is modern and functional, with clear separation between private and communal spaces.
description: A modern residential complex with several single-story houses, a central pool, green lawns, and a parking lot, all enclosed by white walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the central pool flanked by houses.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool, backyards, and the parking lot on the right side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the perimeter wall, parking area, and the arrangement of houses around the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the pool, house rooftops, and the green spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main gate with driveway, simple doors, and minimal overhangs; no prominent porch or columns.
